title: BCD Travel
description: Over 700k Salesforce records and various Sharepoint sites corporate data has been compromised. This is a final warning to reach out by 1 June 2026 before we leak along with several annoying (digital) problems that'll come your way. Make the right decision, don't be the next headline. Pay or Leak. | Updated: 29 May 2026 | Warning: FINAL WARNING PAY OR LEAK
